description: TDD enforcement hooks - requires tests before implementation

hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v$(ls "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^v//' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -1)/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 && test -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/dist/index.js" || (cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/tsconfig.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && cp -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/src" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && npm install --ignore-scripts 2>/dev/null && npx tsc 2>/dev/null) || true

export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v$(ls "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^v//' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -1)/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/dist/index.js"

export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v$(ls "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^v//' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -1)/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/dist/index.js"

export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v$(ls "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^v//' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -1)/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/dist/index.js"
